access_scope.description: Defines the access scope for associating an IAM policy with an Amazon EKS cluster, specifying the level of permissions granted.

cluster_name.description: Name of the EKS cluster to associate the access policy with; must match an existing cluster.

policy_arn.description: ARN of the IAM policy to associate with the Amazon EKS cluster, must be a valid and existing policy ARN.

principal_arn.description: ARN of the IAM entity to associate with the EKS access policy; must be a valid and existing IAM principal.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout configuration for creating, updating, and deleting the EKS access policy association.
